error_signature: only the 1st image saved instead of subsequently generated one
title: Merge Node not updating with new binary data
symptom: The merge node in the workflow only saves the first image created, ignoring subsequent approved images. This leads to incorrect data being saved.
applies_when: Using a merge node to combine binary data
Images are generated in a loop and sent for approval
not_this_if: All images are approved and saved correctly
root_cause: The merge node does not refresh its input data correctly when new binary data is generated in subsequent iterations of the loop. This results in only the first image being retained in the output.
fix_steps: Change the response_type of the API call to 'url'
Replace the Move Binary node with an HTTP Get node
Test the workflow to ensure subsequent images are saved correctly
agent_instruction: Update the API response type and replace the Move Binary node to fix the merge issue.
